body: scripts/e2e-multi-tenant.sh written (UC-08, 7 steps, 244c7d8). Bootstraps tenant_a and tenant_b structures via event append (tenant_created/workspace_created/project_created events). Creates session+run in each tenant. Verifies each session/run is retrievable. Proves cross-tenant isolation by checking run_a data is absent from run_b task list. Handles 404/skip gracefully for event-append variants that may not be supported. Syntax clean.
